name: brapi-mcp-server
description: Collaborative BrAPI v2.1 MCP workspace — studies, germplasm, genotypes across Breedbase, T3, more.

BRAPI_DEFAULT_BASE_URL.title: Default BrAPI Base URL
BRAPI_DEFAULT_BASE_URL.description: Default BrAPI v2 base URL. Optional — connections can be opened at runtime via brapi_connect instead.

BRAPI_ENABLE_WRITES.title: Enable Write Surface
BRAPI_ENABLE_WRITES.description: Opt-in flag for brapi_submit_observations. Off by default.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).
